item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 23min Watching Atletico-Barca tonight and Bayern-Real last week would make you realise wha
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 23min Watching Atletico-Barca tonight and Bayern-Real last week would make you realise what a con job the Premier League is. The whole approach to the game is just so much more enjoyable. Not many atmospheres like that at English grounds either 1 14 1 mil
